landing.title: KYK
landing.subtitle: Know Your Kid · Understand your child’s personality and parenting context
landing.intro_title: A simple way to better understand your child’s personality
landing.intro_desc: KYK helps you explore your child’s temperament and response patterns through a short set of questions. Once your result is saved, the AI Coach can provide more relevant and personalized guidance based on your child’s unique personality.
landing.point_1: • It only takes about 1–2 minutes to complete.
landing.point_2: • You can begin without logging in, but sign-in may be required to save your result.
landing.point_3: • You can retake KYK anytime as your child grows and changes.

step1.title: KYK
step1.question: Q1. Please select 5 adjectives that best describe your child.

step3.title: KYK
step3.modal_body: To save and view your results, please log in with Google. Click OK to proceed to the account selection screen.

questions.q2: My child finds it easy to make new friends.
questions.q3: My child plays quietly by themselves well.
questions.q4: My child naturally speaks to people they meet for the first time.
questions.q5: When listening to a story, my child is curious about the background or reasons.
questions.q6: My child likes to draw things realistically.
questions.q7: My child tends to create imaginary worlds or rules during play.
questions.q8: When a friend cries, my child tries to empathize with them.
questions.q9: My child tries to explain situations logically.
questions.q10: My child considers it important to know what is right and wrong.
questions.q11: My child tends to plan ahead for what they need to do.
questions.q12: My child gets flustered or dislikes it when the schedule changes.
questions.q13: My child tends to do what they want first and put off what they dislike.

gate.title: KYK
gate.modal_desc: You need to log in to save your KYK results and allow the AI Coach to personalize responses for your child.

result.title: KYK
result.subtitle: Our Child’s Primary Personality
result.login_required: You need to log in to view the results.
result.unable_to_display: Unable to display personality test result.
result.keyword_title: Keywords related to this personality profile

login_modal.title: Google login required to view results
login_modal.desc: Save your KYK results to your account and the AI Coach will reflect this personality trait in future sessions.

computed.summary_fish: A thinker type who enjoys deep exploration and analysis.
computed.summary_intj:
A strategist type who looks far ahead and plans systematically. Independently advances toward goals.
Strong in logic and analysis, excelling at finding efficient methods. However, perfectionism can put pressure on themselves. Will show strengths in science, strategy games, and research projects. Increasing flexibility in the process of achieving goals and expanding collaborative experiences with others will widen their perspective.
computed.summary_intp:
A thinker type who enjoys deep exploration and analysis.
Immerses in understanding new concepts and principles. However, can often stay in thoughts rather than execution. Can achieve excellent results in knowledge exploration fields like science, math, programming, and invention. Translating thoughts into small experiments and projects will increase their sense of accomplishment.
computed.summary_infj:
A counselor type who understands people and the world based on deep thought and empathy.
Has insight into people's hearts and the meaning of situations. However, can easily tire without enough alone time. Highly likely to show sincerity in writing, counseling, and artistic activities. Should be encouraged to steadily continue activities that give them inspiration while maintaining their own pace.
computed.summary_infp:
An idealist type who lives protecting their values and ideals.
Rich in imagination and creativity, showing sincerity in what they believe. However, can suffer stress from practical matters. Highly likely to show deep immersion and inspiration in writing, arts, and creative activities. Teaching them how to balance ideals and reality will let them achieve their dreams more healthily.
computed.summary_istj:
A responsible, careful implementer who keeps promises well. Values stability and order.
Has the power to plan and proceed step by step. Completes assigned tasks to the end, earning the trust of those around them. However, can find changes burdensome. Will show strengths in learning, sports with rules, and long-term projects. Consistent effort is highly likely to lead to results. Practicing taking small challenges in new environments while utilizing their stable strengths will open up broader possibilities.
computed.summary_istp:
A practical and analytical problem solver. Adapts quickly to situations.
Has excellent dexterity and observation skills, and likes learning by actually doing things. However, may have low interest in long-term plans. Will stand out in 'activities learned bodily' like crafting, experiments, and sports. Calmly finds solutions in crisis situations. While utilizing their spontaneous strengths, teaching them the habit of taking on tasks with a long breath will broaden their growth.
computed.summary_isfj:
A caring and responsible protector type. Likes helping people around them.
Carefully takes care of others and quietly finishes assigned tasks to the end. However, putting others before their own emotions can easily exhaust them. Will become a trusted member in caregiving, volunteering, and group assignments. Guiding them to have time and hobbies for themselves will let them maintain their energy and help others for a long time.
computed.summary_isfp:
A calm, emotional artist type. Values beauty and harmony.
Immerses in sensory activities like nature, art, and music. However, strongly asserting their opinions can be burdensome. Highly likely to show talent in creative fields like art, music, design, and writing. Learning various ways of self-expression will let them share their heart with more people.
computed.summary_entj:
A leader type advancing powerfully towards goals. Excels at planning and executing efficiently.
Does not hesitate to find center and make decisions in any situation. highly competitive and enthusiastic about taking on difficult challenges. However, can sometimes become impatient, unable to wait for the pace of those around them. Likely to achieve results in group activities or projects requiring leadership. Will grow significantly in goal-oriented environments like sports, debate, or startup camps. Adding 'listening to others' opinions' and 'pacing' to their quick execution will earn them greater trust. Experiencing failure and developing the ability to cope flexibly will mature their leadership further.
computed.summary_entp:
An inventor type who enjoys new attempts and finds creative solutions well. Adept at developing ideas through conversation.
highly curious and looks at problems from various perspectives. Excels in debates and presentations due to their eloquence and quick thinking. However, preferring spontaneity over planning can result in weak follow-through. Likely to be active in invention contests, creativity camps, and debate competitions. Will entertain friends by creating new games or modifying rules. To realize their abundant ideas, teaching them the 'habit of finishing what they start' is important. Guiding them to balance spontaneity and planning will increase their sense of accomplishment.
computed.summary_enfj:
A leader type deeply understanding and guiding others' emotions. Finds meaning in relationships.
Easily spots others' strengths and encourages them. Has a warm heart, reaching out first when friends have a hard time. However, can sometimes carry too much of others' problems. Will stand out in volunteer activities, leadership camps, and collaborative projects. Highly likely to act as a 'strong pillar' in relationships with friends. Must learn to take care of their own emotions just as much as they help others. Maintaining healthy relationships by keeping their 'own boundaries' will make them a good leader for a long time.
computed.summary_enfp:
A free spirit type loving new experiences and people. Creative and highly imaginative.
Seeks fun ideas and adventures, making the surroundings lively. Unafraid of change and challenges. However, can find it difficult to focus on one thing for a long time. Highly likely to lead new attempts in various activities and become a mood maker in clubs or gatherings. Teaching them the habit of completing goals to the end while maintaining their interest will greatly expand their potential. Needs practice linking ideas with execution plans.
computed.summary_estj:
An honest, responsible leader type.
Has the power to follow rules and see things through to the end. Shines brighter in a team than alone, handling tasks accurately and quickly. However, can sometimes push their own ideas strongly. Likely to naturally become a leader in play, presentations, or role-playing with friends. Can grow into a trustworthy child who keeps rules and promises. Practicing listening to various opinions and having the courage to admit mistakes will make them a better leader. Teaching them how to enjoy free play without rules will improve their balance.
computed.summary_estp:
A lively, energetic adventurer type.
Curious about new things and loves to learn by experiencing them physically. Quick to assess situations and act immediately, naturally acting as the mood maker among friends. Unafraid of risks, often trying new games, but sometimes acts before thinking. Likely to excel in activities requiring instant reactions like sports, exploration, performances, and games. Spontaneous leadership shines when leading friends, and their bold nature can draw attention on stage or during presentations. While encouraging new experiences, teaching safety rules and risk prediction will lead to more balanced growth. Building a habit of briefly planning before acting will develop both action and judgment skills.
computed.summary_esfj:
A warm, kind socializer who loves taking care of others. Finds great joy in helping people.
Easily senses others' mood changes and is adept at brightening the atmosphere. Is proactive in organizing gatherings or games and taking care of friends. However, can sometimes tire themselves out by being too conscious of others' expectations. Likely to become a 'central figure' in friendships, demonstrating excellent coordination skills in cooperative activities, organizing events, or group projects. Can shine on stages where teamwork is important, like presentations, choir, or plays. It is good to encourage their helpful nature while teaching them the habit of securing time and space for themselves. Learning that 'it is hard to satisfy everyone' will help them maintain healthier relationships.
computed.summary_esfp:
A bright, cheerful optimist who spontaneously creates fun. Unafraid of new people and new experiences.
Adept at creating moments of joy and laughter, making people around them feel good. Quickly adapts to new play or activities and actively participates. However, preferring spontaneity over planning can sometimes lead to disappointing results due to lack of preparation. Likely to stand out and take center stage at events like festivals, performances, sports days, and camps. Will often take the role of leading the atmosphere and spreading positive energy to peers. While encouraging their fun-seeking nature, teaching them habits of preparation and follow-through in important tasks will help them grow more stably. Practice balancing spontaneity and planning is needed.
